name: Jordan Jumpman Jack TR
description: A Travis Scott collaboration reimagining the Jumpman Jack silhouette with earthy tones and signature reversed Swoosh detailing.

name: BADBO 1.0
description: The iconic silhouette returns in its most recognizable colorway — reflective silver with bold orange accents and premium knit construction.

name: Proto 'Lower Merion'
description: High-frequency Primeknit construction with full-length Boost cushioning in the unmistakable black and white Zebra print.

name: Force 1 Low 'Lower Merion'
description: Made in USA craftsmanship with premium pigskin leather and mesh upper, featuring ENCAP midsole technology for all-day support.

name: Foamposite Pro
description: Deconstructed take on the AF1 classic, featuring exposed foam, zip ties, and signature quotation mark branding.
